name: Cookie consent banner appears for a new visitor and can be dismissed
description: Verifies a first-time visitor sees the cookie/privacy notice with 'Yalnızca gerekli' and 'Kabul et' choices, and clicking one dismisses the banner.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage (/) in a fresh browser session with no prior visits to this site
A cookie/privacy dialog is visible with the heading 'Çerez ve gizlilik' and two buttons: 'Yalnızca gerekli' and 'Kabul et'
The cookie consent dialog is no longer visible
The cookie consent dialog does not reappear (the choice was remembered)
